content.title: Muslims Day ANSAR Update!
content.subtitle: 116 Ansars have already joined this mission!
content.body:
🌿 Alhamdulillah! Muslims Day Ansar Has Reached 116 Members

Today is Jumu'ah — a day of accepted supplications, a day of blessings, and a day to invest in your Hereafter.

Just one month ago, we launched the Muslims Day Ansar (Supporter) program. Alhamdulillah, 116 brothers and sisters have already joined this da'wah mission.

May Allah reward them abundantly in both this world and the Hereafter. Ameen.

🎯 What Is the Mission of Muslims Day?

The goal of Muslims Day is not merely to run an app.

Our vision is to build a platform that helps millions of Muslims become closer to Allah every day — through reading the Qur'an, being more mindful of their prayers, learning du'as, and bringing Islamic values into their families and daily lives.

Over the next 6 months, we aim to grow Muslims Day to 10 million installs, InshaAllah.

So that even more people can benefit from authentic Islamic knowledge, worship, and self-improvement.

🤝 Who Are Muslims Day Ansars?

Running and growing this mission requires continuous support.

That is why we are looking for just 2,000 Ansars from among our millions of users — people who will contribute only 500 BDT per month to support this ongoing Sadaqah Jariyah project.

They are not merely premium subscribers; they are partners in this da'wah mission.

📊 Our Next Milestone

To complete the caravan of 2,000 Ansars, we still need 1,884 more supporters.

Your participation can play a vital role in helping us bring beneficial Islamic knowledge to 10 million Muslims.

Perhaps Allah will use your contribution as a means of spreading the light of Islam to countless people.

💎 What Are the Benefits of Becoming an Ansar?

✅ Opportunity to share in the rewards of the good deeds performed by millions of Muslims

✅ 7 Muslims Day Premium subscriptions

✅ 1 Mahfil Premium subscription

✅ FREE access to exclusive online halaqahs, seminars, and special events

Most importantly, you become part of an ongoing effort to serve Islam and Muslims.

🌙 A Decision This Blessed Friday

Perhaps 500 BDT per month is not a large amount for you — maybe the cost of a single breakfast at a restaurant.

Yet this small contribution may become a form of Sadaqah Jariyah whose rewards continue even after your death, InshaAllah.

Today, on this blessed Jumu'ah, join Muslims Day Ansar and become part of this mission.

InshaAllah, this may become one of the most beautiful investments for your Hereafter.

.

I Want to Become a Muslims Day Ansar 👉 CLICK 👉 https://id.kahf.co/ansar/muslimsday
